{"step_by_step_thinking": "Based on the information provided in the documents, the maxillary sinus is known to be radiopaque and can often extend close to the roots of the maxillary molars. This radiopacity can cause the root apices to appear blurred or obliterated on radiographic images. The other options, such as the palatine bone, zygoma and zygomatic process of maxilla, and orbital process of zygomatic bone, do not have the same level of radiopacity that would cause this effect.", "answer_choice": "A"}
